nodes.name: Northern shriketit
nodes.summary: The northern shriketit (Falcunculus whitei) is a species of bird in the family Falcunculidae. It is found in the Kimberley region of north-western Australia and the Top End of the Northern Territory. References

nodes.name: Falcunculus
nodes.summary: Falcunculus（Falcunculus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如東鵙雀鶲、Western shriketit、Northern shriketit。
